details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia page and extracted the correct laureates for the 3 most recent years. The 2024 and 2023 results match the known facts exactly. The agent also found a 2025 entry (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis) which appears to have been added to the Wikipedia article after the known facts were recorded. All co-laureates for each year were fully listed.
